summary: Removed the repository's GitHub pull request template file. The deleted template only contained a one-line reminder to read the contributing guidelines before submitting a PR.
what_changed: Removed the template text: `Before submitting a pull request, please read our [contributing guidelines](./CONTRIBUTING.md).`
smart_moves: Kept the change minimal: a single-file deletion with no unrelated repository changes.
Removed a PR template that duplicated a generic contribution-guidelines reminder, reducing submission friction if maintainers no longer wanted that prompt.
decomp_lessons: This PR does not contain decompilation, matching, symbol, struct, or source-code lessons.
Repository workflow changes can be intentionally tiny; avoid inferring technical decomp intent from metadata-only edits.
follow_up_queries: Check whether CONTRIBUTING.md still exists and is linked elsewhere after removal of the PR template.
Search later PRs for any replacement GitHub issue or pull request workflow guidance.
